section_2.title: Section 2 — Proof-of-fund
section_2.fr_agg_caption: FR amount = the figure printed on that Fund Report line (often a single cell summing several slips). Sum of slips = the actual total of the underlying proof-of-fund slips this audit attributes to the same FR line. The two should match; the Total row sums every aggregated FR line shown here and should reconcile with the corresponding channel section above (it does not include FR lines that are already 1-slip-per-row, since those have no aggregation to verify).

legend.date: slip's printed date matches the audited business date (§6 r.4).
legend.uniq: slip is not a duplicate (§6 r.5).
legend.acct: deposit landed in one of the six approved Maybank/AmBank accounts (§2, §6 r.6).
legend.pos: slip's amount and channel reconcile to the POS system totals (§6 r.7–8).
legend.cleared: credit confirmed in the bank-ledger Google Sheet for the audited date (T+1..T+3 for cheques) — §6 r.11. Blank when verification is deferred.

section_3.title: Section 3 — Cash highlight
section_3.computed_legend_title: How each Computed value is derived
computed_legend: Opening cash = closing cash carried forward from the previous business date's audit (no recompute today; pulled from the prior FR's closing cash).
Cash revenue (POS) = GreenPOS Cash-tender total for the day (system-generated, source of truth per §6 r.7).

CFP cash top-up = sum of CFP-report top-up entries whose payment mode is cash only. CFP top-ups paid via bank transfer / e-wallet are excluded (they are CFP Deposit, not cash). If today's only CFP top-ups were bank transfer, this is correctly 0.
BuraqMart cash = Autocount POS Cash-tender total for the Buraqmart side of the station.
Safeguards (CDM) pick-up = sum of all Safeguards CDM cash-deposit slips dated for the audit day (cash physically removed from the till and deposited).
Closing cash = Opening + Cash revenue + CFP cash top-up + BuraqMart cash − Safeguards pick-up. Compared to the FR's printed closing cash; any difference appears in the Var column.
